stonetop.summary: Tiny crimson birds that flock to fresh blood.

system.concept: Tiny crimson birds that flock to fresh blood.
system.description: About the size of a woodpecker, with black and wine-red plumage, flitting about in small flocks (2d6+4). Their laugh will make your blood run cold. But don't worry — they'll get your blood flowing again, real soon.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** Butcherbirds can smell fresh blood from miles away, and might descend on a hunter's kill to gorge.
**Something useful:** They can smell the blood of their own, and shun it; smeared butcherbird blood is an excellent repellent.
